chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-514 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 4553/24 2.For order on o/objections 3.For order son MA 4554/24 4.For hearing of main case 17-10-2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate along with applicant. **** Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application and submits that the applicant will file Crl. Direct Complaint before the competent Court of law for redressal of his grievance. He further submits that if the Crl. Direct Complaint is filed, this order shall not come in the way. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
